# iOS Low-Token Policy

Use for every iOS Command Desk handoff.

## Progressive disclosure

Keep discovery metadata short. Keep the active `SKILL.md` focused on the current desk. Load references only when a task needs that topic. Do not paste large framework guidance into the hot path.

## Token tourniquets

- Summarize repo facts once, then reuse the packet.
- Put stable rules before volatile request details.
- Prefer exact file lists over broad repo inspection prompts.
- Remove stale assumptions after new evidence.
- Route to SDLC implementation only after iOS ambiguity is resolved.
- Default to instruction-only skills; scripts are acceptable only when deterministic, reviewed, and valuable.
